title: Gold strategy
author: Famous-Ambassador-39
selftext:
I have been working on a bot that generates and evolves strategies and deploys them on MT5 and only trades XAU/USD.
When I started I was trying with 5 crypto pairs I found it to be too volatile and the markets also "sleep" then I tried a couple of Forex pairs together and Gold in the middle and still didn't work but gold worked in almost all strategies soo I changed to only gold and got a really good return, I wrote a thesis that proves my work, the strategies key metrics are redacted it's a long thesis if anyone is interested I can send the thesis or copy and send where I can send long texts.
